M35-T1.name: Performance defaults pass + clamp audit
M35-T1.deliverable: Evidence-based measurement pass across the 10 Phase 5 settings clamps (rag_chunk_size / rag_chunk_overlap / rag_similarity_threshold / agentic_max_steps / agentic_max_tokens / agentic_timeout_ms / planner_max_tickets / planner_max_depth / planner_escalation_threshold / copilot_interval_minutes) against local Ollama + llama3.1:8b. Measurement: cold 208563 ms / warm #1 66847 ms / warm #2 65872 ms; 2288-char prompt / 734 prompt_eval tokens / ~200 eval tokens; JSON response well-formed. Decision: all 10 defaults HELD (measurement justifies holding, not moving — 66s warm tick vs 120s agentic_timeout_ms = 0.55× utilisation; 5-min copilot cadence vs 66s tick = 4.5× headroom; 8000 token budget vs 1600 projected = 4× headroom). Full measurement block + per-clamp rationale table lives in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts header. Zero production behavior changes; zero new production files; clamp envelopes unchanged.
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts (+47 header comment lines, behavior untouched)

M35 is the Phase 5 exit gate. Zero new IPC / bus events / providers / migrations — hardening + polish + release-marker milestone. v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 semver bump (additive Intelligence Layer, no breaking changes). Estimated ~15 unit tests + 1 cross-milestone E2E spec. Current baseline 1130 unit / 10 E2E → target ~1145 unit / 11 E2E.

Head-of-queue after T10 (Phase 5 COMPLETE marker): Phase 6. Phase 6 scope not yet defined. The first Phase 6 session authors docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md. Candidate themes surfaced from deferred follow-ups: cross-company copilot aggregation, proactive copilot → autonomous action, agent-to-agent negotiation, post-release telemetry digest (drives evidence-based clamp changes from real user data).

Architectural seams active for M35 (unchanged from M34 handoff): three-tier canned test seam QUARTET (test-classifier + test-agentic-provider + test-agentic-tools + test-copilot-provider), {rows, truncated} envelope, data-* stable E2E selector surface (data-step-kind / data-copilot-insight-id / data-copilot-sidebar-root / data-copilot-toolbar-toggle / data-copilot-widget-list), pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController stop, is_system + filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, atomic + ledger commit cadence (M34 deviated — M35 restores the per-task ledger cadence), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, IPC-mutation-emits-bus-event invariant #11.
